cancelEntrant(String, Event, WaitingListEntry, String, OnSuccessListener<Void>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.helios.service.OrganizerNotificationService
Makes a single entrant as cancelled and sends them a cancellation noification Expected callers: OrganizerViewEntrantsFragment when an organizer removes an invited or waiting entrant.

WAITING - Enum constant in enum com.example.helios.model.NotificationAudience
Notification addressed to all entrants currently on the waiting list.
WAITING - Enum constant in enum com.example.helios.model.WaitingListStatus
The entrant is currently waiting to be selected.

Represents one entrant's state within a single event waiting list.
